event: hospitalized earlier for lower limb ischaemia due to peripheral vascular disease
brought to emergency room in an unconscious state
no apparent risk factors when fungaemia was diagnosed
yeast grew in aerobic BacT/ALERT culture bottle
yeast grew in anaerobic BacT/ALERT culture bottle
identified as Candida parapsilosis by VITEK 2 yeast identification system
isolate referred to the Mycology Reference Laboratory
produced turquoise blue colonies on CHROMagar Candida
internally transcribed spacer region of ribosomal DNA amplified and sequenced
antifungal susceptibility testing by Etest performed
DNA sequence 100% identity with Lodderomyces elongisporus type strain
DNA sequence 83% identity with reference Candida parapsilosis strain
formed long ellipsoidal-shaped ascospores on acetate ascospore agar
